attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Yes, I want to deploy to Kubernetes. What's the process?"}]}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"choices": [{"message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "You can build a Docker image with MLflow and deploy it to Kubernetes using standard kubectl commands."}}]}

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an MLflow assistant."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I have a model logged in MLflow. How do I deploy it as an API?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "You can use MLflow's model serving. Register the model and then serve it with the mlflow models serve command."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Yes, I want to deploy to Kubernetes. What's the process?"}], "model": "gemini-3-pro", "tools": [{"type": "function", "function": {"name": "generate_k8s_manifest", "description": "Call the generate_k8s_manifest tool.", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"model_uri": {"type": "string"}, "image": {"type": "string"}, "replicas": {"type": "integer"}, "port": {"type": "integer"}}, "required": ["model_uri", "image", "replicas", "port"]}}}]}

attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"manifest": "apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-classifier
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-classifier
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-classifier
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: model
        image: your-registry/my-classifier:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080", "service_endpoint": "/invocations", "estimated_pod_count": 2}
